name: student_task_output_schema
description: Student-facing structured output schema for the task-first keyword engine.

sections.label: Core Recommendation
sections.purpose: One-screen explanation of why this topic direction is the best fit.

sections.label: Research Flow
sections.purpose: Three to five execution steps the student can follow immediately.

sections.label: Assessment Fit
sections.purpose: Reality check based on subject, grade, and common school assessment patterns.

sections.label: Extension
sections.purpose: One-step expansion ideas that deepen the topic without overreaching.

sections.label: Action Guide
sections.purpose: Direct writing and execution guidance for the report or presentation.
